name: rollcall
description: Ping every Coven familiar (Sage, Echo, Charm, Astra, Kitty, Cody) in parallel to verify each can respond and report which lanes are healthy, slow, or down.

interface.shortDescription: Ping every Coven familiar (Sage, Echo, Charm, Astra, Kitty, Cody) in parallel to verify each can respond and report which lanes are healthy, slow, or down.
interface.longDescription: Resolve each familiar's session key, fire parallel pings via sessions_send, and report a compact ok/timeout/error status block.
